findings.location: s1 — 関連ハンドラ table
findings.description: RST cross-reference directive `:doc:`ThreadContextHandler`` appears verbatim in the knowledge file's markdown table cell. RST directives should not leak into knowledge files; the cell should contain plain text `ThreadContextHandler`.
findings.source_evidence: Source uses RST syntax: `:doc:`ThreadContextHandler`` as a navigation directive. The knowledge file should strip the directive and keep only the class name as plain text.
